Given the user is on the Home screen
When the user launches the app
Then the user should see options to search for hotels, motels, vacation rentals, and more

Given the user is on the Home screen
When the user taps on the search bar
Then the user should be able to enter a city, attraction, landmark, or hotel name to search for accommodations

Given the user is on the Home screen
When the user taps on the filter icon
Then the user should see filtering options such as price, review score, WiFi quality, and other important amenities

Given the user is on the Home screen
When the user scrolls through the daily deals section
Then the user should see daily deals for various accommodations with free cancellation and no booking or credit card fees

Given the user is on the Home screen
When the user taps on a property listing
Then the user should see detailed information about the property, including guest reviews, amenities, and booking options

Given the user is on the Home screen
When the user taps on the 'My Account' icon
Then the user should be navigated to the My Account screen where they can manage their bookings and view account details

Given the user is on the My Account screen
When the user taps on a booking in the list
Then the user should see the booking details, including check-in times, host contact information, and options to make changes or leave a review

Given the user is on the My Account screen
When the user taps on the notifications icon
Then the user should be navigated to the Notifications screen and see a list of recent notifications about their bookings and travel deals

Given the user is on the My Account screen
When the user taps on the customer service option
Then the user should be able to contact 24/7 customer service in their preferred language

Given the user is on the My Account screen
When the user taps on the paperless confirmation option for a booking
Then the user should see a digital confirmation that can be used at check-in
